01 — Profile

The analyst behind the dashboard

A cross-disciplinary path from design to data — now focused on building analytics that people actually use.

I'm Bharani, an MSc Business Intelligence & Analytics student at Clermont School of Business. I design end-to-end BI solutions — from raw data and ETL pipelines to interactive dashboards and AI-generated insight.

My edge is range. A background spanning design, an MBA in Systems & HR, and analytics means I read both the data and the business question behind it — then translate one into the other for non-technical stakeholders.

Lately I've been building AI-powered analytics: full-stack apps that pair deterministic KPI logic with large language models to turn spreadsheets into board-ready reports.

Studying MSc BI & Analytics
Available Jul 2026 · 6 months
Based in Clermont-Ferrand 🇫🇷

03 — Selected work

Projects that prove it

Self-initiated builds on real data — not classroom simulations. Filter by what you're looking for.

⬡ AI · Full-stack ★ FLAGSHIP

Smart Bees — AI Marketing Analytics Platform

A full-stack web app that ingests any marketing CSV, auto-detects and prioritizes KPIs, renders interactive Plotly charts, and streams a professional analyst report written by Claude. Engineered with security in mind — deterministic KPI math in Python, environment-based API keys, and injection-safe rendering of model output.

5tech stack
AutoKPI extraction
LiveAI reporting
PythonStreamlitPlotlyAnthropic APIpandas
▦ BI · Analytics

Spotify Streaming & Revenue Analytics

End-to-end BI solution analysing streaming volume, artist revenue, and genre trends. A star/snowflake schema enables OLAP drill-down across time, geography, and category — surfaced through interactive Power BI and MicroStrategy dashboards.

2BI platforms
OLAPdrill-down
PythonSQLPower BIMicroStrategy
▦ BI · Analytics

IPL Toss-Winning Performance Analysis

A BI solution across 800+ IPL matches with a full ETL pipeline and star schema. Delivers 5+ KPI widgets analysing win-rate across toss decisions, innings, and team metrics — mirroring sales/marketing BI workflows.

800+matches
5+KPI widgets
